name: agent-miner-codex
description: Agent mining hooks for Bloomfilter (Codex on Windows, macOS, Linux, and WSL)

interface.shortDescription: Capture Codex hook events for Bloomfilter observability (Windows, macOS, Linux, WSL)
interface.longDescription: Collects supported Codex hook events, batches them locally by session, and uploads them to Bloomfilter for observability and analysis. Runs on Windows, macOS, Linux, and WSL from a single plugin.
